untranslatable_reason: Pattern detection (descending triangle formation and recovery phase) requires candlestick pattern recognition that is not available in the allowed indicators. The signal requires identifying geometric price pattern structure, which cannot be expressed using only price, moving averages, RSI, ATR, Bollinger Bands, MACD, ADX, Stochastic, Donchian, Pivots, volume, and bar property indicators. Additionally, 'BULL_MARKET' and 'BEAR_MARKET' are not in the allowed regime list (only TRENDING_UP, TRENDING_DOWN, RANGING, HIGH_VOL, ANY are permitted).
translation_notes: This signal fundamentally requires pattern recognition logic beyond point-in-time indicator values. A practical implementation would need: (1) A descending triangle detector that identifies lower highs and a horizontal support level, (2) Recovery confirmation logic to detect upward breakout from pattern, (3) Pattern context tracking (prior decline). The entry condition provided (close > prev_low) is a minimal proxy for upward movement but does not capture the pattern geometry. Market regime mapping would also need adjustment to use TRENDING_UP/TRENDING_DOWN instead of BULL_MARKET/BEAR_MARKET.
